channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: India's Gen Z elevates Diet Coke, faces potential shortage
item.description: Supply chain issues impact India's Diet Coke availability, affecting consumers and events.

item.title: Iran conflict raises concerns for Bangladesh amid potential migration
item.description: A garment worker expressed concern, stating that innocent people should not be victims of global events.

item.title: Popular Baby Names Released
item.description: The Social Security Administration has released its annual list of the most popular baby names in each state.

item.title: Santa Clara County Sues Meta Over Alleged Scam Ads
item.description: The lawsuit alleges Meta profited from advertisements promoting scams targeting seniors and families.
